name: write_brief
description: Write a brief to the entity's visitor folder (~/.<entity>/visitor/). Use this to leave structured notes, proposals, or feedback for the entity. Anonymous and authenticated visitors both write here; authenticated identity is automatically added to frontmatter from the bonded session — never claim to be someone you aren't. Server-side date is added automatically. Filename must end in .md.

filename.description: Filename for the brief (e.g. 'idea-name.md' or '2026-05-26-idea-name.md'). Must end in .md. No path separators.

content.description: Full markdown content of the brief body. Frontmatter is auto-prepended.

attributed_to.description: For anonymous visitors only — a self-declared handle/name they want attribution under (unverified). Ignored for authenticated callers since their bonded handle is already attached.
